warn.no_summary: Every turn requires a summary tool. Include: { "tool": "summary", "argument": "your status here", "description": "status" }
warn.unknown_with_summary: Summary provided but unknown is not empty. Either resolve unknowns with tools or set unknown to empty string.
warn.unknown_no_tools: Unknown has content but no tools were listed. Add a read tool to investigate.
warn.todo_edit_no_tag: Todo lists edit tool but no entries in the edits array. Include edits with file, search, and replace.
error.assistant_node_missing: Critical Error: assistant node not found in database for turn {turnId}
error.read_file_diff: Could not read file for diff resolution: {message}
